mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, MENU_id, TITLE, WRITER, ( SELECT COUNT(FILE_NUM) FROM FILES F WHERE B.IDX = F.IDX ) filescount, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD B
AND MENU_ID = #{ menu_id }
AND ${searchType} Like '%' || #{ keyword } || '%'
ORDER BY IDX DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{numOfRows} ROWS ONLY
SELECT IDX, MENU_id, TITLE, WRITER, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = #{idx}
SELECT FILE_NUM, IDX, FILENAME, FILEEXT, SFILENAME FROM FILES WHERE IDX = #{idx}
SELECT FILE_NUM, IDX, FILENAME, FILEEXT, SFILENAME FROM FILES WHERE FILE_NUM = #{file_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(IDX), 0)+1 FROM BOARD), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer})

insert.foreach: INTO files VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUM), 0) FROM FILES) +#{i} +1, (SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM BOARD), #{file.filename}, #{file.fileext}, #{file.sfilename})
